```python
import pytest

def test_basic_conversion():
    """Test happy path conversions from snake_case to camelCase."""
    assert snake_to_camel("hello_world") == "helloWorld"
    assert snake_to_camel("this_is_a_test") == "thisIsATest"
    assert snake_to_camel("a_b_c_d") == "aBCD"

def test_single_word():
    """Test edge case with a single word (no underscores)."""
    assert snake_to_camel("hello") == "hello"
    assert snake_to_camel("world") == "world"

def test_empty_string():
    """Test edge case with an empty string."""
    assert snake_to_camel("") == ""

def test_only_underscores():
    """Test edge case with a string consisting only of underscores."""
    assert snake_to_camel("___") == ""
    assert snake_to_camel("_") == ""

def test_leading_underscore():
    """Test edge case with a leading underscore."""
    assert snake_to_camel("_hello") == "Hello"
    assert snake_to_camel("_hello_world") == "HelloWorld"

def test_trailing_underscore():
    """Test edge case with a trailing underscore."""
    assert snake_to_camel("hello_") == "hello"
    assert snake_to_camel("hello_world_") == "helloWorld"

def test_multiple_consecutive_underscores():
    """Test edge case with multiple consecutive underscores."""
    assert snake_to_camel("hello__world") == "helloWorld"
    assert snake_to_camel("a___b") == "aB"

def test_no_underscores():
    """Test edge case with a string that has no underscores (already camelCase or single word)."""
    assert snake_to_camel("helloWorld") == "helloWorld"
    assert snake_to_camel("camelCase") == "camelCase"

def test_all_uppercase():
    """Test edge case with all uppercase letters."""
    assert snake_to_camel("HELLO_WORLD") == "HELLOWorld"
    assert snake_to_camel("A_B_C") == "ABC"

def test_mixed_case():
    """Test edge case with mixed case in parts."""
    assert snake_to_camel("HeLLo_WoRLd") == "HeLLoWoRLd"

def test_non_string_input():
    """Test error case with non-string input (raises AttributeError since split is a string method)."""
    with pytest.raises(AttributeError):
        snake_to_camel(123)
    
    with pytest.raises(AttributeError):
        snake_to_camel(None)
    
    with pytest.raises(AttributeError):
        snake_to_camel(["hello", "world"])
```
